specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services — from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater work, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you're buying a boat, maintaining one, or dealing with an unexpected issue below the waterline, we're the crew you call.

Our team handles the full spectrum of what your boat actually needs. We conduct detailed pre-purchase and insurance surveys so you know exactly what you're getting into before you sign anything. Our divers handle hull inspections, prop work, and underwater repairs without the hassle of a haul-out. When the South Florida heat gets serious, we service and repair marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable. And when it comes to marine plumbing and sanitation — holding tanks, through-hulls, heads, and all the stuff nobody wants to deal with — we handle it properly and by the book.

We serve boat owners across South Florida, covering a wide radius from our base and working with everything from day cruisers to liveaboards. If you're docked, moored, or anchored anywhere in our service area and need a marine professional who takes the work seriously, Ben's Boatworks is ready to help. We've built our reputation one honest job at a time, and that's how we intend to keep it.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks performs comprehensive pre-purchase, insurance, and condition-and-value surveys to give boat owners and buyers a clear, honest picture of a vessel's condition. Our inspections cover structural integrity, mechanical systems, safety equipment, and more — documented in a detailed written report. A proper survey protects your investment and gives you the information you need to make confident decisions.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our dive team handles hull inspections, propeller removal and installation, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and underwater repairs — all without requiring a costly haul-out. We work on vessels at the dock, on the mooring, or at anchor, keeping downtime to a minimum. Regular underwater inspections help catch growth, corrosion, and damage before they turn into bigger problems.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including chilled-water and self-contained units commonly found on cruisers and liveaboards. We diagnose refrigerant issues, clean seawater strainers and heat exchangers, and address electrical faults that cause systems to underperform. Keeping your climate control system in good shape makes a real difference in onboard comfort during warm-weather seasons.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, including holding tank installation and repair, through-hull and seacock service, freshwater system maintenance, and marine head repairs. Proper sanitation systems are critical for both compliance with marine regulations and the comfort of everyone aboard. We work with the systems as they are or help owners upgrade to more reliable, regulation-compliant setups.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull inspection and zinc anode replacement at the dock
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis, cleaning, and repair
Holding tank installation and marine sanitation system overhaul
Propeller removal, inspection, and reinstallation by dive crew
Through-hull and seacock inspection, service, or replacement
Insurance survey documentation for vessel coverage or renewal
